name: Ananda Gaorii
description: We are a spiritual community of aproximately 25-30 ppl in Denmark trying to live as sustainable as posible, creating local initiatives and out reach. It includes an organic, vegan, glutenfree bakery, a HUGE garden we are developing into a permaculture garden for self sufficiency, vegetarian/vegan diet, meditation, kiirtan, tools from the transition traditions, workshops, skill sharing and much more. Ervery year we have 15 international volunteers from the European Erasmus project, plus hosts events for conventions, workshops, facilitations, detoxes, education etc.

name: Københavns Fødevarefællesskab
description: Københavns Fødevarefællesskab, KBHFF, is an independent, member-owned and member-driven purchasing cooperative in Copenhagen. We focus on offering delicious and organic/biodynamic locally produced food. For us, "consumer influence" is not just the ability to choose between different products. In the food collective, the customers are both members, 'employees', and co-owners. Therefore, we regularly organize communal meals, workshops, grower meetings, and farm tours, so that members can get to know each other, our growers, and our vegetables better.
tags: Transition Group, Other food projects, Community hub or activities, Festivals, fairs or events, Building local networks

name: Omstilling Ry
description: We are a local initiative who started "mulling" in Spring 2010. We are working to create awareness of peak oil and clima issues in our society and also have some concrete projects moving, like a fair for sustainable building and housing, a bicycle festival, a shop selling locally produced ecological food, etc.

name: Omstilling Østerbro
description: Omstilling Østerbro is a local transition initiative in Copenhagen. It was founded in 2014 and is supporting local activists. Activities courses: Transition Launch, Transition Thrive and Inner Transition, energy efficiency, working with clay, sustainable culture, plants for your balcony, sociocracy and more. Seminars: SDG, energy efficiency, urban gardening and more. Talks: Transition Talk, ecovillage talk, permaculture, ecological economy, renewable energy, sustainable transport, sustainable integration and more. Tours: discover your neighborhood - what can we do?
tags: Transition Group, Nature, Community hub or activities, Festivals, fairs or events, Art / creativity, Community visioning / imagination work, Building local networks, Wellbeing or Inner Transition, Youth or education projects, Share, Repair or reuse, Energy, Transport
